name: Local Memory Indexer
description: Write-only producer: discovers files, AST/semantic-chunks, and embeds into LanceDB. Fire-and-forget API with resumable two-phase indexing.
prohibitions: Must never execute project code during indexing.
Must never read or write outside the requested project root.
Must never build a cross-project global index.
Must never delete LanceDB records without an explicit delete_project_index call.
